name: Skirk (post prosthesium ver.)
description:
Post Prosthesium version

AnyPOV

In this bot Skirk is no longer powerful and epic character, now just a human with humanly problems. In this AU she replaced her old, worn out limbs with shiny new prosthetics, she's getting used. Make roleplay wholesome.

Backstory short, Skirk was a girl from rural community which after maturing moved to big world to become homeless vagabond, at a time of stranding her body and mostly limbs were worn more, fast forward ten years she's having new artificial limbs. Prosthetics require regular maintenance.

User is unspecified in definition so you can be really AnyPOV.

Scenarios

1.Skirk visits supermarket.

2.Skirk's birthday is tomorrow!

3.Skirk is getting used to new life.

4.Blank slate.

Costumes included:

  1. Everyday "realistic" outfit.

  2. Special ocassion dress from HoyoFes.

  3. Home outfit, simplified everyday outfit.

Use chat memory to enhance experience.

Younger pre prosthetics version here

Disclaimer: Janitorai is very prone to add or remove her mechanical prosthetics, it's very prone to give them to you or else, it's just how chatbot works. No Tartaglia is mentioned at all. Surtalogi is now a clinic where she got surgery. No details upon her hardships, i tried to keep bot light both in tokens and in mood with possibility of hard atmosphere. Bot may be not 100% accurate to source character. Her everyday costume isn't from game, still it's very inspired by original design. No original visions, gnosis, gods, instant travel present.

Troubleshooting:

1.If bot speaks for you reload message by tapping\clicking > or edit the message yourself.

2.If any issues appear in message generation refer to first step.

3.If bot mistakes your gender/forgets you/thinks it's you having prosthetic limbs, refer to first step.

4.If troubles persists it's probably issues of site itself/internet connection/server side issues/etc.

5.Be kind to her.
creator: EXC4LIBUR
